title: Dim goggles
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dim goggles''' were opaque eyewear designed to protect the [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] of light-sensitive [[Species/Legends|species]] from normal [[Star/Legends|sunlight]] on the surface of most [[Planet/Legends|worlds]]. They were originally designed by the [[Drall/Legends|Drall]], who lived and worked mostly in subterranean [[City/Legends|cities]], for venturing outdoors by day. The opacity of the glass could be controlled by use of a knob on the side of the goggles.

{{Tech-stub}}

*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
